Flow.description: Northstar. Before-save: on every Account create/update, derive Website_Domain__c as the bare lower-case domain of Website (strip http(s):// protocol, a leading www., and any path/query/fragment from the first /, ?, or # onward). Website_Domain__c is a plain text field populated here because Salesforce matching rules reject formula fields as match criteria, so Northstar_Account_Match keys on this stamped value instead. Always recomputed so the domain stays in sync with Website; blank Website yields blank.

formulas.name: DomainFromWebsite
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Website}), "", IF( CONTAINS( IF( LEFT(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"), 4) = "www.", MID(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"), 5, LEN(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"))), SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/") ), "/" ), LEFT( IF( LEFT(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"), 4) = "www.", MID(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"), 5, LEN(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"))), SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/") ), FIND( "/", IF( LEFT(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"), 4) = "www.", MID(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"), 5, LEN(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"))), SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/") ) ) - 1 ), IF( LEFT(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"), 4) = "www.", MID(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"), 5, LEN(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/"))), SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(TRIM({!$Record.Website})), "https://", ""), "http://", ""), "?", "/"), "#", "/") ) ) )

Flow.interviewLabel: Account Before Save - Set Website Domain {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Account Before Save - Set Website Domain
